overview: This Bant deck leverages flying creatures and evasion to assemble a synergistic board state centered around Aang, Swift Savior and Appa, Steadfast Guardian. By cycling through Bramble Familiar and other low-cost spells, you generate card advantage while protecting your combo pieces. The goal is to quickly establish an unblockable aerial threat that overwhelms opponents before they can stabilize in Standard.
win_conditions: Assemble Aang, Swift Savior and Appa, Steadfast Guardian to create an unblockable flying threat.
Use Bramble Familiar to generate card advantage and protect key combo pieces.
Overwhelm the opponent with rapid aerial pressure before they can deploy board wipes.

keep_criteria: Hands with two or more low-cost creatures.
Hands containing Aang, Swift Savior or Appa, Steadfast Guardian.
Hands with Bramble Familiar and a cheap spell to cycle.
mulligan_criteria: Hands lacking creature synergies or cycling outlets.
Hands with no way to protect or deploy the combo pieces early.

early_game: Play lands and cheap creatures to establish board presence.
Cycle through Bramble Familiar to find combo pieces.
Protect Aang, Swift Savior and Appa, Steadfast Guardian from early removal.
mid_game: Assemble the core combo by getting both signature creatures onto the battlefield.
Use flying evasion to apply pressure while searching for answers.
Maintain card advantage through cycling and draw effects.
late_game: Close out the game with an unblockable aerial assault.
Stabilize against board wipes by keeping backup creatures in hand.
Leverage card advantage to out-resource opponents in extended games.

key_cards.name: Appa, Steadfast Guardian
key_cards.role: Core combo piece that provides evasion and board presence.
key_cards.notes: Prioritize keeping this protected until Aang, Swift Savior enters the battlefield to maximize synergy.

key_cards.name: Aang, Swift Savior
key_cards.role: Primary win condition that enables unblockable flying threats.
key_cards.notes: Deploy early to trigger synergies with Appa, Steadfast Guardian and apply immediate pressure.

key_cards.name: Bramble Familiar
key_cards.role: Card advantage engine and combo protector.
key_cards.notes: Use its cycling ability to dig for key pieces while maintaining a body to block or trade.

sequencing_tips: Always prioritize casting Aang, Swift Savior before Appa, Steadfast Guardian to maximize early synergy.
Cycle Bramble Familiar only when you have enough lands to play the next turn's combo piece.
Hold up removal or counterspells to protect your flying threats from opponent's early interaction.

matchups.advice: Prioritize playing Bramble Familiar early to stabilize and cycle for removal. Keep flying blockers in hand to trade efficiently.
Play around counterspells by cycling cheap cards to bait removal. Assemble the combo quickly before they can lock down the board.
Apply consistent aerial pressure to force unfavorable trades. Use Bramble Familiar to out-draw them while protecting your combo pieces.

overview_evidence.evidence_span: Archetype name and signature cards imply a flying-focused combo strategy in Standard.

win_conditions_evidence.evidence_span: Derived from signature cards and combo archetype naming.

sequencing_tips_evidence.evidence_span: Standard combo piloting principles applied to the provided signature cards.

common_threats_evidence.evidence_span: Standard format meta expectations applied to a flying combo archetype.
